notes: Core mechanics present but maze layout is incomplete (only 26 rows vs 31 expected), ghost AI is rudimentary, pac-man movement feels jittery due to alignment correction, and collision detection is imprecise, making the game functional but rough around the edges.

An incredibly impressive single-file implementation with authentic ghost AI (Blinky/Pinky/Inky/Clyde targeting), proper scatter/chase modes, and smooth gameplay, though movement speed is tied to framerate.

A recognizable and mostly working Pac-Man clone with decent controls and no obvious crashers, but the maze/layout is inaccurate, positioning/pathing are somewhat off, and several gameplay details feel unpolished rather than arcade-faithful.
